playbook.intent: Instead of a roadmap drift through 'features stakeholders shouted loudest about', PM picks one customer journey, finds the worst bottleneck via funnel plus qualitative data, and runs a one-quarter focused attack. Faion has no journey-mapping or bottleneck-prioritization methodology — this is a major team-PM gap.
playbook.scope: Instead of a roadmap drift through 'features stakeholders shouted loudest about', PM picks one customer journey, finds the worst bottleneck via funnel plus qualitative data, and runs a one-quarter focused attack. Faion has no journey-mapping or bottleneck-prioritization methodology — this is a major team-PM gap.

success-criteria.criterion: One journey explicitly chosen; rest deprioritised
Quant bottleneck named with rate + absolute loss
Qual report converging on the cause
Quarter-end verdict on bottleneck conversion change

stage.name: Pick the journey
stage.intent: Choose the single journey the quarter will attack.

tasks.task: List 3-5 candidate journeys (activation, retention, expansion, etc.)
Pick the one tied to the active OKR
Lock the choice for the quarter

stage.decision-gate: Advance when one journey is picked and the rest are explicitly deprioritised.

stage.name: Funnel scan

tasks.task: Build the journey funnel with stage-by-stage conversion

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the worst stage is named with both rate + absolute loss.

stage.name: Qual layer
stage.intent: Find the qualitative why behind the drop.

tasks.task: Interview 5+ users who dropped at the bottleneck stage
Compare quant drop to qual causes for consistency

outputs.output: Qual report at the bottleneck stage

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3+ users converge on the same cause.

stage.name: Attack design

tasks.task: List 3-5 candidate interventions for the bottleneck
Schedule them as sequenced experiments across the quarter

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the attack plan has 3-5 ranked experiments with start dates.

stage.name: Read + decide
stage.intent: End the quarter with a verdict.

tasks.task: Compare bottleneck conversion before vs after
Tag interventions as win / no-op / negative
Decide whether the journey gets a second quarter or releases attention

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written verdict at quarter end.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content run-a-quarterly-journey-bottleneck-attack --format md, agent: faion get-content run-a-quarterly-journey-bottleneck-attack --format context, json: faion get-content run-a-quarterly-journey-bottleneck-attack --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
